infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Forge Fit reads your Apple Health data so it can summarize your activity, sleep, and recovery alongside your WHOOP data.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Forge Fit does not write to Apple Health by default; this is reserved for future features.
